overview: This fish appears to be a juvenile catfish, likely a Walking catfish (Clarias gariepinus) or similar species. It is being held in the beak of a bird, and young catfish are known to cause sharp pain if handled improperly due to their spines. Catfish are generally distinguished by their prominent whiskers, or barbels. Web results
